hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' 2>/dev/null); case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx) out=$(cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1) || jq -n --arg o "$out" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:("tsc --noEmit failed after your edit:\n"+$o)}}' ;; esac
